article_items.title: Bezos brushes off concerns of an AI bubble: 'You shouldn't worry about it'
article_items.description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos shrugged off concerns of a looming AI bubble, saying the massive investments will ultimately drive the technology forward over time.
